text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back home from a trip out with
Silence Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Wow, would you look at all that water in the
river. O-oh yeah...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Speaking of water... Are you feeling thirsty?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... I-is that so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's clearly something up with Silence Suzuka.
choice_data_list:
C-come to think of it, I guess I am a bit
parched.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I have some mineral water with me. Would you
like some?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... I forgot I finished it already.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry... Um, what to do...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'll go buy another one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She turns around, ready to dash off, but I rush to
stop her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sorry... I got a little ahead of myself.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... I wanted to do something... to make you
happy.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to show you my gratitude for everything
you always do for me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If she wants to make me happy, then...
choice_data_list:
I'm happy as long as you can run without any
worries weighing you down.

I'm happy as long as you're careful not to run
too much.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Without any worries?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I understand. If that would make you
happy, then...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'll get right to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This time, I'm not able to stop her. She runs off
ahead and fades out of sight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue walking by myself until I see her
running back toward me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! The sunset down by the river is so
beautiful! You should—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wait... This isn't any different from our usual
training...
choice_data_list: I didn't mean "start running right now"...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You didn't?! But I was certain you—I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'll take some time and think of a proper way to
show you my gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But, um... The scenery I mentioned really was
beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Would you mind if I go on ahead and run home?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka turns around once again and runs
off into the distance, worry-free.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: U-um, I...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I understand. I'll make sure to be careful.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Don't run too much. Don't run too much.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wait a moment... How much is too much? How
many hours, exactly?
choice_data_list: Just don't push yourself too hard!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank goodness. I wasn't sure what you
meant...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'll run as much as I can without pushing myself
too hard. Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: On that note, I'm going to run along the river—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wait. What did we decide I should do to show
you my gratitude?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Looks like we'll have to put a pin in it.
